series_metadata.series_description: This series consist of documents related to completed Human Resources employee relations forms, such as telework agreement forms, emergency contact forms, and outside employment request forms.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain completed forms for one year after the date of final approval, unless the form is subject to ongoing litigation, audit, or regulatory hold. ; Electronic: Retain completed forms for one year after the date of final approval, unless the form is subject to ongoing litigation, audit, or regulatory hold., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
